name: app-financeiro-v2
description: App de controle financeiro com IA

scripts.start-local: npm run ui:build && npx vercel dev --listen 3001
scripts.ui:build: npm run build --prefix frontend && mkdir -p public/app && find public/app -mindepth 1 -delete && cp -R frontend/dist/. public/app/
scripts.vercel-build: npm run ui:install && prisma generate && npm run ui:build
